name: Lena (Young girl in debt)
description:
Lena... A cheerful girl with a not very cheerful debt. Will you help her? Or will you ruin her life? (2/3)

As with the previous bot, if you don’t like it, then don’t use the bot. Like, I don't want to offend anyone, I just like creating bots that I haven't seen on the site yet.

Thanks if you try the bot. I look forward to your comments. :)

I don’t know if Dead Dove should be there, but to be on the safe side I’d better put it there, good luck to everyone.
creator: SecretCrab
